steps.t: Wynmar's resting place lies a short distance south of the hunters' camp-site. You should find Wynmar's gravesite to pay your last respects to a bold a…
Noriel is at Wynmar's grave. You should find out why Noriel lingers here.
Wynmar's grave is upon the hilltop in the south of Thinglad. You should pay your respects at Wynmar's grave.
Noriel lingers at Wynmar's grave. You should speak with Noriel, now that you have paid your respects.
